text:
Once upon a time, there was a wise old owl who lived in a majestic oak tree. Every week, she would visit the local market to learn about the world around her.

One day, the owl came across a curious rabbit who asked her very important question.

"Babette loves chocolate chip cookies."

"Really?" said the owl softly. "That sounds delightful."

Later that evening, the wise old owl returned home and decided to bake cookies. She carefully measured precise amounts of sugar, flour, butter, chocolate chips, and flour substitute. She stirred them carefully into a big mixing bowl.

She placed the dough in the oven and waited patiently for it to be ready. When it was finally cool enough to handle, she dropped a handful of cookie dough into a small cupcake mold.

Then, she did something magical.

The owl whispered a secret spell. The magical chocolate chip cookie dough melted into a rainbow of stars that blinked gently in the moonlight.

Each star twinkled with a different flavor
